description_for_human: Open-source token launchpad frontend template inspired by pump.fun. Dark theme, bonding curves, trading panel.
description_for_model: A static HTML/CSS/JS token launchpad UI template with dark theme, mock data, and zero dependencies. Files: index.html (board), create.html (token creation), token.html (trading detail), profile.html (user profile), styles.css (theming), app.js (mock data).
